title: what dose it say on the dvd menu of death and rebirth
display_title: what dose it say on the dvd menu of death and rebirth
wikitext:
[]: what dose it say on the dvd menu of death and rebirth?             Quote Post by Annihilator » Tue Jan 01, 2008 8:42 pm to fast :(

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Tue Jan 01, 2008 9:05 pm Not everyone has the same release ya know. Also, where exactly?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Jan 07, 2008 9:59 am I think Annihilator is talking about the American Manga Release The one where it says things like I AM ME CAN I LIVE IN THIS WORLD okok not exactly but IIRC it was flashing philosphical statments it sounded like Shinji woild have made in EoTV

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Mon Jan 07, 2008 11:30 am Edit: Ok, nevermind. Got my copy. Let's see. Why do you exist A world where Nothing exists but myself But Everyone hates me Everything is Just a shape So then what am I I hate you! Why did they make a double sided dvd? I freaking hate these formats, they get scratched so easily. Argh.
